name: Shadowmoor Hexer
description: You always have the Hex spell prepared. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for this spell. You can cast it once without a spell slot per long rest, or using any spell slots you have. When a creature that you've cursed with Hex hits you with an attack roll, the creature takes Psychic damage equal to your Proficiency Bonus once per turn.
